name: S-Adenosyl-L-Methionine (SAMe)
effects: May improve depressive symptoms in some studies
May reduce osteoarthritis pain in some trials
contraindications: Can precipitate mania in bipolar-spectrum patients

sources.title: PubMed clinical review literature on SAMe for depression and osteoarthritis

description: SAMe is synthesized from methionine and ATP; oral products are often enteric-coated for stability.
summary: Endogenous methyl-donor supplement with moderate evidence for mood/joint indications and neuropsychiatric caution.
mechanism: Proposed methyl-donor effects on neurotransmitter turnover and related pathways.
safetyNotes: May cause GI upset or nervousness.
interactions: Potential additive serotonergic risk with SSRIs/SNRIs/MAOIs.
preparation: Enteric-coated oral tablets; injectable forms exist in medical settings.
regulatoryStatus: US dietary supplement; some prescription/injectable contexts exist.
mechanisms: Proposed methyl-donor effects on neurotransmitter turnover and related pathways
